name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement (MNDA) allowing two parties to exchange confidential information for an evaluation purpose.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: Cover page used with the Mutual NDA Standard Terms to capture the purpose, effective date, term, and governing law for a specific MNDA.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard terms governing access to and use of a vendor's cloud service, covering support, payment, data privacy, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard terms for granting an early customer access to a product in exchange for feedback and participation in a design partner program.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard terms defining uptime and response time targets for a cloud service, along with service credit remedies for missed targets.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard terms for engaging a services provider to perform work under one or more statements of work, covering deliverables, IP, payment, and warranties.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard terms governing the processing of personal data by a service provider on behalf of a customer, including international data transfer mechanisms.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for licensing on-premises or client-side software, covering license grants, updates, restrictions, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for a business partnership between two companies, covering obligations, trademark licensing, payment, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard terms for a time-limited pilot or trial of a product before entering into a longer-term definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard terms required under HIPAA governing a business associate's use and protection of protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard terms supplementing a product agreement to govern the use of AI services, including input/output ownership, model training, and AI-specific disclaimers.
